detail.description:
The next encounter will be in the world of Qingqiu.

The flagship 3D Xianxia masterpiece of 2026, *Qingqiu World: Origin*, reconstructs the romance and grandeur of Eastern Xianxia with ultra-high-precision modeling and a dynamic lighting system.

You will become the last disciple of the Shouling lineage, wielding the incomplete Demon-Controlling Order. The Vermilion Bird's spirit stirs, and the ancient seal is about to break—beyond slaying demons and monsters, you must also uncover the forbidden
